title: ocimum monocotyloides
intro: Ocimum monocotyloides, also known as East Indian thyme or East Indian basil, is a plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocimum monocotyloides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
